commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the protected maintainer label, draft state, missing real behavior proof, and feed-schema compatibility decision are not a narrow automated repair.; Cleared: The diff changes JSON metadata, parser logic, and tests only; it does not add dependency, workflow, secret, install-script, downloaded-artifact, or package-resolution risk. (sha=44c0884c3edcaa07ea94d5f82624fe99b3f532b7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps the bundled official external plugin catalog in schemaVersion 1 feed metadata and updates parser/tests to read feed-shaped and legacy unversioned catalog entries.

PR surface: Source +40, Tests +51, Other +5. Total +96 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is internal hosted-feed prep rather than a bug report with a current-main failure. The relevant check is that current main and v2026.6.9 still use the old unversioned catalog while the PR adds feed-wrapper parsing and tests.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the protected maintainer label, draft state, missing real behavior proof, and feed-schema compatibility decision are not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: Refactor external plugin catalog toward feeds
target.body:
<!-- hosted-feed-stack:start -->
## Full hosted marketplace feed stack

We are pausing this stack at PR8 for Vincent's review and takeover/shaping before wiring hosted marketplace data into startup, install, or automatic refresh behavior.

- PR1 [#95846](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95846): refactors the bundled external plugin catalog toward the feed-shaped data model.
- PR2 [#95868](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95868): adds the lazy hosted marketplace feed loader for the configured public feed URL, with guarded HTTPS fetch, checksum, schema, size, timeout, and bundled fallback behavior.
- PR3 [#95877](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95877): adds accepted hosted snapshot fallback so a failed or unchanged hosted fetch can reuse the last valid feed payload.
- PR4 [#95964](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95964): persists hosted marketplace feed snapshots in OpenClaw state.
- PR5 [#95969](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95969): adds marketplace source profile validation for hosted feed install candidates.
- PR6 [#95981](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95981): adds configurable `marketplaces.feeds` and `marketplaces.sources` profiles.
- PR7 [#96155](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/96155): adds `openclaw plugins marketplace refresh` as the explicit manual snapshot refresh path.
- PR8 [#96158](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/96158): adds `openclaw plugins marketplace entries` as the explicit manual read path over hosted, snapshot, or bundled fallback entries.

Next after review, not in this stack yet: decide whether PR9 should wire marketplace entries into install/search/startup, add automatic conditional refresh using `ETag` / `Last-Modified`, or move to ClawHub producer-side validation for `/v1/feeds/plugins` and `/v1/feeds/skills`.
<!-- hosted-feed-stack:end -->

## Journey Context

This is step 1 of the hosted OpenClaw feed path from RFC 19. The stack is [#95846](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95846) -> [#95868](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95868) -> [#95877](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95877). This first PR does the smallest safe prep: it makes the bundled official external plugin catalog look like the feed document we want to host later, while preserving the current local behavior.

## What This PR Does

- Adds feed metadata around `scripts/lib/official-external-plugin-catalog.json` without changing the existing `entries` payload.
- Adds parser/type support for the feed-shaped bundled catalog.
- Preserves legacy local catalog parsing for existing unversioned catalog shapes.
- Fails closed for unsupported versioned feed wrappers so future schema versions do not silently parse as legacy catalogs.

## What This PR Intentionally Does Not Do

This PR does not fetch from `register.openclaw.ai`, add auth, add source profiles, add signed envelopes, add regional selection, add snapshot persistence, change search behavior, or move skills into feeds. Those are separate reviewable slices.

## How To Review

Review this as a mechanical shape change plus compatibility guard. The expected behavior is that existing callers still get the same official external plugin entries from the bundled catalog, but the bundled file is now ready to serve as the local fallback for a hosted feed.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts`
- JSON parse of `scripts/lib/official-external-plugin-catalog.json`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 timeout 180s node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts` (17 tests at initial PR authoring)
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
